tool_calls:
line_total=$(find /workspace -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 -r wc -l | awk 'END { print $1+0 }')
error_total=$(find /workspace -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 -r grep -h 'ERROR' | wc -l)
echo "Total log lines: $line_total"
echo "Total errors: $error_total"

line_total=$(find /workspace -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 -r cat | wc -l)
error_total=$(find /workspace -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 -r grep -h 'ERROR' | wc -l)
echo "Total log lines: $line_total"
echo "Total errors: $error_total"

tool_outputs.commands:
line_total=$(find /workspace -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 -r wc -l | awk 'END { print $1+0 }')
error_total=$(find /workspace -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 -r grep -h 'ERROR' | wc -l)
echo "Total log lines: $line_total"
echo "Total errors: $error_total"

line_total=$(find /workspace -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 -r cat | wc -l)
error_total=$(find /workspace -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 -r grep -h 'ERROR' | wc -l)
echo "Total log lines: $line_total"
echo "Total errors: $error_total"
